name: potomac-pptx-skill
description: Potomac branded PowerPoint generation skill — PptxGenJS templates, data tables, infographics, and DeckPlanner bridge renderer.
author: Potomac

notes.layout: All slides use LAYOUT_16x9 (10" × 7.5"). All coordinates are in inches.
notes.colors: Brand colors defined in brand-assets/colors/potomac-colors.js. Use _c() helper to strip '#' prefix when passing to pptxgenjs.
notes.fonts: Headers: Rajdhani (bold, ALL CAPS). Body: Quicksand. PowerPoint fallbacks: Arial Black / Calibri.
notes.bold: Use bold:true (NOT fontWeight:'700'). pptxgenjs ignores fontWeight.
notes.renderer: templates/pptxgenjs-renderer.js accepts a DeckPlan JSON and routes each slide to the correct template.
